en.BMW CarData Streaming (MQTT). Dieses Mod: BMW CarData streaming (MQTT). This module requires a parent 'MQTT Client'. It is created automatically via the gateway/connection icon above.
en.Die Client-ID wird im BMW CarData Kunden: The client ID is generated in the BMW CarData customer portal. The client must be subscribed to 'CarData Stream' (scope cardata:streaming:read) - BEFORE logging in.
en.Schritt 1: 'Login starten' klicken. Link: Step 1: Click 'Start login'. A link + code appears. Sign in with your BMW ID in the browser. Step 2: Then click 'Complete login' - the MQTT client is then configured automatically.
en.Host, Port, TLS, Username und Passwort (: Host, port, TLS, username and password (id_token) are written into the MQTT client automatically on login. The topic subscription must be entered once in the MQTT client - the button below shows the exact values.
en.Das id_token (MQTT-Passwort) ist nur 1 S: The id_token (MQTT password) is only valid for 1 hour and is renewed automatically. Keep the interval below 60 minutes.
en.Nicht angemeldet - bitte Login durchführ: Not logged in - please log in
en.Login läuft - bitte im Browser anmelden: Login in progress - please sign in via browser and complete login
en.Bitte zuerst die Client-ID eintragen und: Please enter the client ID first and click 'Apply'.
en.Bitte diese Adresse im Browser öffnen un: Please open this address in a browser and sign in with your BMW ID credentials:
en.Der Code ist %d Sekunden gültig. Danach: The code is valid for %d seconds. Then click 'Complete login'.
en.Die Anmeldung im Browser ist noch nicht: The browser login is not yet complete. Please sign in via the browser first, then click 'Complete login' again.
en.ACHTUNG: Der Scope \"cardata:streaming:r: WARNING: The scope "cardata:streaming:read" is missing! Please subscribe the client to "CarData Stream" in the BMW portal and run the login again.
en.Der MQTT-Client wurde konfiguriert. Prüf: The MQTT client has been configured. Check the connection in the parent "MQTT Client" and that the topic is subscribed there (see "Show connection details").
en.MQTT-Verbindungsdaten für den übergeordn: MQTT connection details for the parent "MQTT Client":
en.Trage das Topic-Abo im MQTT-Client unter: Enter the topic subscription in the MQTT client under "Subscriptions". Host/port/TLS/username/password are set automatically on login.
en.Noch kein Token vorhanden. Bitte zuerst: No token yet. Please complete the login (step 1 + 2) first.
en.MQTT-Client wurde mit Host, Port, TLS, U: MQTT client configured with host, port, TLS, username and id_token.
en.Konnte den MQTT-Client nicht konfigurier: Could not configure the MQTT client. Is an "MQTT Client" instance connected as the parent gateway?
